name: ANC_AVAILABILITY_TYPES_VL
query: SELECT B.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, T.NAME, B.ACTIVE_STATUS, B.CONTRACTED_HOURS, B.WORK_SHIFT_TYPE, B.REPEATED_PATTERN_TYPE, B.LEGISLATION_CODE, B.IS_WORK_PATTERN_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM ANC_AVAILABILITY_TYPES_B B, ANC_AVAILABILITY_TYPES_TL T WHERE B.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_ID = T.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
